title: Christmas Ornaments
description: We produced branded Christmas ornaments, as well as art-custom ornaments for brands and our own limited edition ornaments for artist StereoBoogie. Our branded ornaments are unique limited-edition corporate gifts for holiday campaigns.

details.task: Produce a line of custom Christmas ornaments for brands and an in-house limited edition series.
details.solution: Developed design concepts for branded and art ornaments, produced a hand-painted series. A separate limited collection was created in collaboration with artist StereoBoogie.
details.result: The ornaments became a sought-after corporate gift and collectible object - a unique format at the intersection of branding and art.
